title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models via a simple API client.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers (via fetch).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter that exposes Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, multi-model, file upload, RAG, admin panel).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with streaming, embeddings, model management utilities.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive terminal UI for Ollama written in Rust (fuzzy finder, chat history, themes).

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat interface.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: function calling, vision, fine-tune, Docker Compose stacks, GPU tweaks.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official multi-arch Docker images (CPU & GPU) with one-line run commands.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express proxy that adds JWT auth, rate limits, usage logs atop Ollama.

title: ollama-grpc
summary: gRPC bindings for Ollama (Go & Python) enabling high-performance streaming.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain in a single Docker Compose.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift package for macOS/iOS apps to chat with Ollama via SwiftUI Combine publishers.

title: ollama-benchmark
summary: Automated benchmark suite measuring tokens/sec, latency, memory across models & hardware.

title: ollama-powershell
summary: PowerShell module wrapping the Ollama API with pipe-friendly cmdlets for Windows admins.
